mapper.sql: id, question_id, `type`, content, rating, is_accepted, ai_response_time, create_time
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM qa_answer WHERE question_id = #{questionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qa_answer (question_id, `type`, content, rating, ai_response_time, create_time) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{type}, #{content}, #{rating}, #{aiResponseTime}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE qa_answer SET rating = #{rating} WHERE id = #{id}
